network.stats.hero.title: Network TDH Stats
network.stats.charts.totalAria: Bar chart comparing total boosted, unboosted, and unweighted TDH over time.
network.stats.charts.netAria: Bar chart comparing daily net boosted, unboosted, and unweighted TDH changes.
network.stats.charts.createdAria: Bar chart comparing daily created boosted, unboosted, and unweighted TDH.
network.stats.charts.destroyedAria: Bar chart comparing daily destroyed boosted, unboosted, and unweighted TDH.
network.levels.hero.title: Levels
network.levels.intro: Levels are our integrated metric of TDH and Rep.
network.levels.trust: TDH and rep are added together and the level is determined by the table below. It is our most integrated measure of trust in our ecosystem.
network.levels.limit: Levels start at zero and are currently capped at 100 (for 25,000,000 TDH).
network.levels.determinedByTable: Levels are determined by the table below.
network.levels.adjustments: As with all metrics, they may be adjusted to better meet their objectives.
network.levels.table.caption: Thresholds by Level
